name: rpg-creator
description: Author a complete narrative RPG and compile it into its own self-contained, directly-playable Claude Code skill — a "baked game" with its own slash command. Interview-driven design of world, cast, lore, story and mechanics; SillyTavern-style 主角/配角 character cards; and a bundled save/recap engine, all distilled so each game runs with no generic engine loaded at play time.
